description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, set on a rectangular green plot. The front facade features a covered porch supported by slender columns, a large window, and a main entrance door. The side elevations display a mix of long horizontal windows and solid wall sections, emphasizing privacy and natural light. The rear of the bungalow includes a wide sliding glass door and a small set of steps leading to the yard. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark window frames and roof trim. Adjacent to the house, there are three vertical signboards or panels, possibly for address or decorative purposes.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a green rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, large window, and adjacent signboards.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long horizontal window and solid wall sections, with the signboards visible in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide sliding glass door, small steps, and the three signboards more prominently.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a large window and a secondary entrance or utility door, with the signboards on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows on multiple facades
